objectives.note: Script has bug with set -e and [[ ]] short-circuit; manually updated Task Order section with correct wave structure

approaches_tried.reason: Script exits with code 1 due to cc_union [[ != ]] short-circuit with set -euo pipefail; manually updated Task Order section instead

deviations.reason: generate-task-order.sh has a bug where cc_union returns exit code 1 when two nodes are in the same component (because [[ rx != ry ]] short-circuits with exit 1), causing failure under set -e. Manually updated Task Order section with correct wave structure computed using Kahn's algorithm in Python.
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: altered — manually updated Task Order due to script bug)*
